researcher: Findings: B2B analytics startups commonly use seat-based and usage-based pricing, often with a free trial tier. Key open question: which model fits a self-serve motion.
writer: Introducing one-click export: you can now download your full dataset as CSV or JSON straight from the dashboard. No tickets, no waiting — your data, on your terms.
critic: Two issues: (1) the retry counter increments after the sleep, so the last attempt is skipped (off-by-one); (2) the shared `attempts` dict is mutated without a lock — a race under concurrency. Add a lock and move the increment.
